section.title: Metropolis: London - Vocabulary
section.summary: Historical, geographical, and industrial vocabulary related to the development and status of London.

questions.prompt: How do you translate the verb 'to hide – hid – hidden' into French?
questions.explanation: According to the source, 'to hide' translates to 'cacher'.

questions.prompt: What is the French translation for the expression 'in plain sight'?
questions.explanation: The source defines 'in plain sight' as 'à la vue de tous'.

questions.explanation: The source lists 'to go back in time' as 'remonter dans le temps'.

questions.prompt: How do you translate 'whether it is X or Y'?
choices: que ce soit X ou Y
si c'est bien X et Y
quand c'est lié à X et Y
car c'est entre X et Y
parce que c'est X ou Y
questions.explanation: The source lists this as 'que ce soit X ou Y'.
